primary_source: Wall, D. D. (1960). Fibonacci series modulo m. American Mathematical Monthly 67(6), 525-532. DOI: 10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541.
note: a=8 is coprime to 3 (8 mod 3 = 2); all 3 routes land on Cosmos. Fibonacci F_6=8 is the Satellite cycle length yet itself is a pure-Cosmos value — the cycle length governs the period structure, not the reachability.
